name: synthesize_video_intro
description: Synthesize a short video intro for one client via HeyGen, from source text supplied by the builder specialist. Called by the builder specialist itself, inside the site-build pipeline — not a separate specialist role. A site_draft missing this asset is a voice_qa fail, not a partial pass.

client_id.description: Client this synthesized video asset belongs to.

script_text.description: Exact script to synthesize, sourced from site_copy.headline + .bio — never invented by the tool.

source_text_ref.description: Which site_copy field(s) the script came from.

avatar_ref.description: Existing HeyGen avatar/likeness reference for this client, if provisioned. Omit if not yet set up (falls back to a generic avatar).

output_dir.description: Client's own preview_dir; the tool rejects any resolved path that escapes this client's own directory.
